    Publications

    List of peer-reviewed journal articles, conference papers, and preprints. Key publications are marked with relevant badges.

    Preprint Multimodal Learning
    MAPLE: Modality-Aware Post-training and Learning Ecosystem

    Nikhil Verma*, Minjung Kim*, JooYoung Yoo*, Kyung-Min Jin*, Manasa Bharadwaj, Kevin Ferreira, Ko Keun Kim, and Youngjoon Kim

    arXiv preprint arXiv:2602.11596, 2026. (* Equal contribution)

    arXiv
    BibTeX

    Journal (Neural Networks) Pose Estimation
    Masked Kinematic Continuity-aware Hierarchical Attention Network for pose estimation in videos

    Kyung-Min Jin, Gun-Hee Lee, Woo-Jeoung Nam, Tae-Kyung Kang, Hyun-Woo Kim, and Seong-Whan Lee

    Neural Networks, Volume 169, Pages 282-292, 2024.

    ScienceDirect
    BibTeX

    Journal (Pattern Recognition) 3D Pose Estimation
    MHCanonNet: Multi-Hypothesis Canonical lifting Network for self-supervised 3D human pose estimation in the wild video

    Hyun-Woo Kim, Gun-Hee Lee, Woo-Jeoung Nam, Kyung-Min Jin, Tae-Kyung Kang, Geon-Jun Yang, and Seong-Whan Lee

    Pattern Recognition, Volume 145, Article 109908, 2024.
